title: See all tasks I completed today across all boards in My Work

posts.author: talm (Tal Macmil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’m looking for a way to see all the tasks I marked as “Done” today, across all boards, directly from the My Work section.
Right now I can only see active or assigned tasks, but I’d like to filter and view completed items based on today’s date.

Is there a way to do that within My Work or with another built-in view or filter?

Thanks!
